title: agalinis glandulosa
intro: Agalinis glandulosa, also known as downy agalinis, is a perennial herb native to North America that belongs to the Orobanchaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Agalinis glandulosa include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce congestion, and ease symptoms of allergies. Agalinis glandulosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
